nodes.name: 乌拉圭
nodes.summary: 乌拉圭是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联186种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、斑拟䳍、冠叫鸭等186种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Ochre-faced tody-flycatcher
nodes.summary: Ochre-faced tody-flycatcher（Ochre-faced tody-flycatcher，学名 Poecilotriccus plumbeiceps），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The ochre-faced tody-flycatcher (Poecilotriccus plumbeiceps) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay, Peru, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | journal=Bulletin of the British Ornithologists' Club | title=Three New Species and Novel Distributional Data for Birds in Uruguay | volume=128 | pages=38–56 | date= 2008 | url=https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/page/45653582 |access-date=February 14, 2025 }} The ochre-faced tody-flycatcher inhabits the edges of humid forest and also dense undergrowth in secondary forest
